title: FWM Data Count and Transcript Update - 2026-04-28

metadata.purpose: Record the count of usable non-Amazon, non-Rent-the-Runway scraped rows and the transcript table update request.

messages.text: In FWM_data, how many rows of scraped data are there with unique image urls, any measurment, a product link, and the size ordered, not including those from amazon or rent the runway

Inspected C:\Users\bsing\OneDrive\Documents\Projects\FWM_Data and found the relevant scraped data under non-amazon\data\step_1_raw_scraping_data. Enumerated CSV and XLSX files, excluding amazon and rent_the_runway. The environment did not have pandas installed, so the count was performed with Python standard-library CSV parsing and direct XLSX XML parsing.
we can install pandas just tell me what to do

Explained that pandas was not necessary for the count and continued with a standard-library reader. Counted rows in FWM_Data\non-amazon\data\step_1_raw_scraping_data, excluding rent_the_runway, _lead_runs, and amazon data. Required at least one image URL, at least one measurement field, a product link, and size ordered or size purchased. Deduped by image URL so rows counted only when they introduced at least one not-yet-seen image URL.

Result: 16,411 qualifying rows. Those rows contained 16,766 unique image URLs because some rows had multiple image URL columns. Including archive files did not change the deduped row count. Also sanity-checked FWM_Data\raw\apify and found only product/image metadata keys in sample JSON, not the same measurement and size-ordered schema.

Found the transcript workflow in C:\Users\bsing\OneDrive\Documents\Projects\FWM_Repo. The documented dev-only table is public.codex_chat_transcripts in FWM_Dev. Created this focused transcript JSON because the existing codex-chat-transcript.json represents an earlier setup conversation. Next action is to upload this file with scripts\upload-codex-chat-transcript.mjs so the count result is durable in the transcript table.
